description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a dark, speckled granite-like surface and a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top face. The grooves are deep and regular, giving the block a ribbed appearance from above. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a consistent dark coloration and a slightly reflective finish. The block appears dense and heavy, with sharp, well-defined edges and corners. Its overall form is geometric and precise, suggesting it is manufactured or carefully cut. The block is likely intended for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments, such as a curb, divider, or protective element.
description: A dark, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and smooth, solid sides. The block has a speckled granite appearance and a heavy, durable look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ribbed top surface with parallel grooves and the solid, smooth front face.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and regularity of the grooves, with the block's length running horizontally.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the grooved top and solid back face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the deep, evenly spaced grooves and the block's rectangular profile.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or divider
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned as part of a row of similar blocks
